commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR classifies invalid or expired thinking-signature provider errors as replay-invalid, retries matching pre-output terminal stream errors without thinking blocks, carries static fallback model params through fallback resolution, and updates a Copilot hook test fixture.

PR surface: Source +57, Tests +177. Total +234 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible. Current main can surface provider failures as terminal AssistantMessage error events while the existing wrapper only retries thrown or rejected errors; live long-session expiry was not rerun in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed now; automerge can rely on exact-head checks, mergeability, and maintainer acceptance of the bounded provider/session risk.

target.title: fix(agents): classify expired thinking signatures
